name: 15-multi-batch-content
description: Five source items with batchSize=2 — exercises the multi-batch loop in ContentBatchProcessor.processBatches. Asserts 3 saveContentItems calls (batches of 2, 2, and 1), 5 distinct mappings, and no duplicate source IDs. Catches regressions in batch splitting, intra-batch ordering, and per-batch result extraction that single-batch scenarios can't reach.
